feed.title: lumi's trashcan
feed.subtitle: a personal trashcan for thoughts, ideas, random reviews, and guides.

entry.title: Yuru Camp: A chill camping experience from home

link.title: Yuru Camp: A chill camping experience from home

entry.summary: I’ll be honest, I’m a gigantic sucker for slice-of-life anime. My anime list is literally chock-full of slice-of-life, with only a few selective shounens here and there. Most of the slice-of-life stuff are, as expected, mundane, basic and niche. But, one slice-of-life anime that truly struck different from everything else, is Yuru Camp. Premise So, what is Yuru Camp? It’s an anime about a gro...
